requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Back-Office Communication for Networked Chargers in Malawi
requirement_topic.zh: 马拉维联网充电桩的OCPP互操作与后台通信
requirement_topic.zht: 馬拉威聯網充電樁的OCPP互操作與後台通訊

summary.en: Malawi does not currently operate a national EV charging management platform equivalent to Qatar's Kahramaa Tarsheed system, reflecting the nascent state of its EV market as of 2026. No mandatory OCPP or specific back-office protocol requirement for EV chargers in Malawi could be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. However, any networked EV charging project in Malawi that is funded by development finance institutions (DFIs), international donors, or multinational operators is very likely to specify OCPP as the back-office protocol, given that OCPP is the internationally dominant open standard for charge point management and is required by the majority of IEC-aligned EV charging networks globally. OCPP 1.6 (JSON) and OCPP 2.0.1 are the most widely required versions. For DC fast chargers, the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack applies for vehicle-to-charger charging authorisation and smart charging functions, replacing the GB/T 27930 CAN bus protocol used in China. EMC compliance under IEC 61000 series is expected for any electrical equipment imported under MBS framework.
summary.zh: 截至2026年，马拉维目前没有与卡塔尔卡赫拉马Tarsheed系统同等的国家电动汽车充电管理平台，反映其电动汽车市场的初级状态。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认马拉维电动汽车充电桩的强制OCPP或具体后台协议要求。然而，马拉维任何由开发性金融机构（DFI）、国际捐助方或跨国运营商资助的联网电动汽车充电项目，极有可能将OCPP指定为后台协议，因为OCPP是全球充电点管理领域占主导地位的国际开放标准，全球大多数IEC体系电动汽车充电网络均有此要求。OCPP 1.6（JSON）和OCPP 2.0.1是最普遍要求的版本。对于直流快充，IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈适用于车辆与充电桩之间的充电授权和智能充电功能，取代中国使用的GB/T 27930 CAN总线协议。依据IEC 61000系列的EMC合规对于在MBS框架下进口的任何电气设备均属预期要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年，馬拉威目前沒有與卡塔爾卡赫拉馬Tarsheed系統同等的國家電動汽車充電管理平台，反映其電動汽車市場的初級狀態。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認馬拉威電動汽車充電樁的強制OCPP或具體後台協議要求。然而，馬拉威任何由開發性金融機構（DFI）、國際捐助方或跨國運營商資助的聯網電動汽車充電項目，極有可能將OCPP指定為後台協議，因為OCPP是全球充電點管理領域佔主導地位的國際開放標準，全球大多數IEC體系電動汽車充電網絡均有此要求。OCPP 1.6（JSON）和OCPP 2.0.1是最普遍要求的版本。對於直流快充，IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧適用於車輛與充電樁之間的充電授權和智能充電功能，取代中國使用的GB/T 27930 CAN總線協議。依據IEC 61000系列的EMC合規對於在MBS框架下進口的任何電氣設備均屬預期要求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP 1.6 (JSON) and OCPP 2.0.1 — Open Charge Point Protocol (Open Charge Alliance)
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
ISO 15118 — Road vehicles — Vehicle to grid communication interface
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) — limits and test methods
MBS (Malawi Bureau of Standards) — IEC-aligned EMC requirements for imported electrical equipment

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack still uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 and OCPP-integrated systems. EMC compliance for China-market chargers is assessed under GB/T standards rather than IEC 61000 series; a clause-level gap assessment is needed before relying on GB/T EMC evidence for MBS import assessment.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系统所要求的PP/CP信号。中国市场充电桩的EMC合规依据GB/T标准而非IEC 61000系列评估；在依赖GB/T EMC证据用于MBS进口评估之前，需完成逐条差距评估。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系統所要求的PP/CP信號。中國市場充電樁的EMC合規依據GB/T標準而非IEC 61000系列評估；在依賴GB/T EMC證據用於MBS進口評估之前，需完成逐條差距評估。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: Exporters targeting Malawi EV charging projects should: (1) confirm OCPP support (version 1.6 JSON or 2.0.1) in charger firmware, as DFI-funded or internationally specified projects will require it; (2) for DC fast chargers, replace GB/T 27930 DC vehicle communication with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack to support CCS2-compatible vehicles; (3) provide IEC 61000 series EMC test evidence from an ILAC-recognised laboratory rather than GB/T EMC reports only; (4) confirm that remote monitoring, fault-reporting, and load-management functions can integrate with any management platform specified by the project developer or operator; (5) note that mobile connectivity (GSM/4G back-haul for OCPP) may be unreliable at some Malawi sites — offline or store-and-forward OCPP modes should be considered for grid-constrained deployments.
gap.zh: 以马拉维电动汽车充电项目为目标的出口商应：(1) 确认充电桩固件支持OCPP（1.6 JSON或2.0.1版本），因开发性金融机构资助或国际规范的项目将有此要求；(2) 对于直流快充，将GB/T 27930直流车辆通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈，以支持CCS2兼容车辆；(3) 提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC测试证据，而非仅提供GB/T EMC报告；(4) 确认远程监控、故障报告和负载管理功能可与项目开发商或运营商指定的任何管理平台集成；(5) 注意马拉维部分站点的移动网络连接（OCPP的GSM/4G回传）可能不稳定——对于受电网制约的部署，应考虑离线或存储转发OCPP模式。
gap.zht: 以馬拉威電動汽車充電項目為目標的出口商應：(1) 確認充電樁固件支持OCPP（1.6 JSON或2.0.1版本），因開發性金融機構資助或國際規範的項目將有此要求；(2) 對於直流快充，將GB/T 27930直流車輛通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧，以支持CCS2兼容車輛；(3) 提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC測試證據，而非僅提供GB/T EMC報告；(4) 確認遠程監控、故障報告和負載管理功能可與項目開發商或運營商指定的任何管理平台集成；(5) 注意馬拉威部分站點的移動網絡連接（OCPP的GSM/4G回傳）可能不穩定——對於受電網制約的部署，應考慮離線或存儲轉發OCPP模式。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed mandatory national OCPP or back-office requirement in Malawi as of 2026-06-14; OCPP is effectively mandatory for DFI-funded or internationally specified projects; IEC 61000 series EMC compliance expected under MBS import framework — verify current MBS requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2 DC deployments; GB/T EMC standards are not accepted as direct IEC 61000 equivalents without a gap assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No national OCPP mandate exists in Malawi, but DFI-funded and internationally specified EV charging projects will require it. GB/T 27930 DC communication is incompatible with CCS2 vehicle charging in Malawi and cannot substitute for IEC 61851-24. EMC evidence should be IEC 61000 series from ILAC-accredited labs. Factor in mobile connectivity limitations at rural or grid-constrained Malawi sites when specifying OCPP back-haul.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马拉维目前不存在国家强制OCPP要求，但开发性金融机构资助和国际规范的电动汽车充电项目将有此要求。GB/T 27930直流通信与马拉维的CCS2车辆充电不兼容，不能替代IEC 61851-24。EMC证据应为ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列。在规划OCPP回传时，应充分考虑马拉维农村或电网受限站点的移动网络连接局限性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬拉威目前不存在國家強制OCPP要求，但開發性金融機構資助和國際規範的電動汽車充電項目將有此要求。GB/T 27930直流通訊與馬拉威的CCS2車輛充電不兼容，不能替代IEC 61851-24。EMC證據應為ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列。在規劃OCPP回傳時，應充分考慮馬拉威農村或電網受限站點的移動網絡連接局限性。
